author: Авакумов Данил Эдуардович
objective: Build a deterministic multi-regime Phase R1 sweep runner with manifest discipline and bounded result collection for selection-physics comparison.
tests_required: runner smoke test on reduced seed count
definition_of_done: runner executes required regime set from manifest
failed runs are retained rather than dropped
failure_conditions: manifest is implicit or embedded only in code comments
task drifts into post-hoc threshold tuning
